name: Spacetime Transcendence
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>時</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>越</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Banish 2 or more Dinosaur monsters from your GY; Special Summon 1 Dinosaur monster from your hand or GY whose Level equals the total Levels of those banished monsters, but it cannot attack this turn.
